MaxLineLength:CreatePurchaseRequestScreen.kt$Text("â‚ą%,.2f".format(total), style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)

MaxLineLength:PayablesHomeScreen.kt$Text(statusLabel, style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall, color = statusColor, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold, modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 6.dp, vertical = 3.dp))
MaxLineLength:PayablesHomeScreen.kt$val openPoCount = state.purchaseOrders.count { it.status == PoStatus.APPROVED || it.status == PoStatus.PENDING_APPROVAL }
MaxLineLength:PayablesHomeScreen.kt$val pendingInvoiceCount = state.invoices.count { it.status == InvoiceStatus.UNMATCHED || it.status == InvoiceStatus.MATCHED }
MaxLineLength:PurchaseRequestDetailsScreen.kt$PoStatus.APPROVED -> TStep("Approved", Icons.Filled.CheckCircle, StatusColors.success, active = true, note = "PO raised with vendor")
MaxLineLength:PurchaseRequestDetailsScreen.kt$PoStatus.REJECTED -> TStep("Rejected", Icons.Filled.CheckCircle, StatusColors.error, active = true, note = "Contact procurement")

MaxLineLength:PurchaseRequestDetailsScreen.kt$TStep("Under Review", Icons.Filled.HourglassBottom, StatusColors.warning, active = status != PoStatus.DRAFT, note = if (status != PoStatus.DRAFT) "Awaiting approver sign-off" else "")

MaxLineLength:PurchaseRequestDetailsScreen.kt$Text("Approval Timeline", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold)
MaxLineLength:PurchaseRequestDetailsScreen.kt$Text("Line Items", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge, color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant, fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold)
MaxLineLength:PurchaseRequestSuccessScreen.kt$text = "Your request has been sent to the procurement team for review. You'll be notified once it's approved."
